import torch
import torch.nn as nn

class SAKTLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, d_model, n_heads, dropout=0.2):
        super().__init__()
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(d_model, n_heads, dropout=dropout, batch_first=True)
        self.norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(d_model)
        self.ffn = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(d_model, d_model * 4),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(d_model * 4, d_model),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
        )
        self.norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(d_model)
    
    def forward(self, query, memory, attn_mask=None, key_padding_mask=None):
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(query, memory, memory, attn_mask=attn_mask, key_padding_mask=key_padding_mask)
        query = self.norm1(query + attn_out)
        ffn_out = self.ffn(query)
        query = self.norm2(query + ffn_out)
        return query

class SAKT(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, max_seq_len, d_model=128, n_heads=8, n_layers=2, dropout=0.3):
        super().__init__()
        self.d_model = d_model
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        
        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, d_model)
        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, d_model)
        self.pos_emb = nn.Embedding(max_seq_len, d_model)
        
        self.query_norm = nn.LayerNorm(d_model)
        self.memory_norm = nn.LayerNorm(d_model)
        self.emb_dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        
        self.layers = nn.ModuleList([
            SAKTLayer(d_model, n_heads, dropout) for _ in range(n_layers)
        ])
        
        self.out_norm = nn.LayerNorm(d_model)
        self.fc = nn.Linear(d_model, 1)
    
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, lengths):
        B, T = skill_ids.shape
        device = skill_ids.device
        
        pos = torch.arange(T, device=device).unsqueeze(0).expand(B, T)
        
        # Query: what skill are we predicting
        query = self.emb_dropout(self.query_norm(self.skill_emb(skill_ids) + self.pos_emb(pos)))
        # Memory: what interactions happened (skill + correct + position)
        memory = self.emb_dropout(self.memory_norm(self.skill_emb(skill_ids) + self.correct_emb(corrects) + self.pos_emb(pos)))
        
        # Causal mask: query[t] can only attend to memory[0..t-1]
        causal_mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(T, T, device=device), diagonal=0).bool()
        # Memory padding mask
        memory_padding_mask = torch.arange(T, device=device).unsqueeze(0) >= lengths.unsqueeze(1)
        
        x = query
        for layer in self.layers:
            x = layer(x, memory, attn_mask=causal_mask, key_padding_mask=memory_padding_mask)
        
        x = self.out_norm(x)
        logits = self.fc(x).squeeze(-1)
        
        return logits
